Announcements

Announcements

Revised Final exam Schedule of Engineering and Natural Sciences Faculty 2025-26 Fall

13
						January

2026

Dear Students,

Please note that the final exams, originally scheduled for Monday, January 12th, have been postponed to Monday, January 19th, 2026 due to the holiday.

The revised schedule is attached.

Good Luck

Dean of the Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences
